response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry-level role, with 15+ years of experience including senior and staff positions at major tech companies. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and fullstack background align well with the technical requirements, but the seniority mismatch raises concerns about retention, salary expectations, and willingness to accept a junior/mid-level role. Based in Berlin which may help with on-site requirement, though location relative to the employer is unknown.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple senior roles
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
Berlin-based, fluent English, and has built platforms with similar integration complexity
concerns: Massively overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
Likely salary expectations far exceed junior/mid-level budget
Only basic German and no PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed
